title.en: Insulet Recalls Omnipod Pods Insulin Pump for Potential Defect

summary.en: The FDA announced a Class I recall by Insulet Corporation of its Omnipod Pods insulin pump due to a risk of device failure that may lead to under-delivery of insulin. This affects patients using the Omnipod system. Patients should immediately stop using impacted pods and contact Insulet for return and replacement. Healthcare providers must identify, quarantine, and report any adverse events.
summary.zh: 美国FDA宣布Insulet公司对Omnipod Pods胰岛素泵实施I级召回，原因是存在导致胰岛素输注不足的装置故障风险。受影响的是使用Omnipod系统的患者。患者应立即停止使用受影响的Pod，并联系Insulet进行退换。医疗提供者需识别、隔离相关产品并报告不良事件。

title.en: Heart Pump Recall: Abiomed Removes Impella CP Sets with SmartAssist
title.zh: 心脏泵召回：Abiomed移除Impella CP SmartAssist套装

summary.en: The FDA announced that Abiomed is recalling and removing certain Impella CP Sets with SmartAssist, a temporary heart pump, due to a potential device malfunction that could cause serious adverse health events. The recall affects hospitals and healthcare providers using these systems to support patients during high-risk procedures. Affected units should be immediately quarantined and returned per the manufacturer’s instructions.
summary.zh: FDA宣布，Abiomed因装置潜在故障可能导致严重不良健康事件，召回并移除特定Impella CP with SmartAssist一次性心脏泵套装。该召回影响到使用此系统在高风险手术中支持患者的医院及医疗机构。应立即隔离受影响产品并按照制造商说明退货。

title.en: FDA Title 21 CFR Update: Medical Device Parts 800-898 Revised (June 26, 2026)
title.zh: FDA联邦法规第21篇更新：涉及医疗器械第800-898部分 (2026年6月26日)

summary.en: The FDA has updated Title 21 of the Code of Federal Regulations (CFR), with the latest revision dated June 26, 2026. This update potentially affects medical device regulations under Parts 800-898. Regulatory affairs professionals should review the amended sections to ensure ongoing compliance for medical device manufacturing, labeling, and quality systems.
summary.zh: FDA更新了《联邦法规》(CFR)第21篇，最新修订日期为2026年6月26日。此次更新可能影响第800-898部分下的医疗器械法规。注册法规专业人员应审查修订后的条款，以确保医疗器械制造、标签和质量系统的持续合规。

title.en: Accuray CyberKnife Recall: Collimator May Not Fully Dock, Risk of Unexpected Motion if In-Room Pendant Used
title.zh: Accuray CyberKnife系统召回：准直器未完全对接，使用室内控制器可能引发意外移动

summary.en: The FDA posted a recall for Accuray Incorporated's CyberKnife Treatment Delivery System with Xchange Robotic Collimator Changer. In certain cases, a collimator may fail to fully dock, triggering a system interlock that prevents motion from the operator console. If personnel then enter the treatment room and initiate motion using the in-room control pendant, the collimator could move unexpectedly, posing a risk of injury. Healthcare providers should follow the manufacturer's recall instructions immediately and ensure staff are aware not to use the in-room pendant when this interlock is active.
summary.zh: 美国FDA发布Accuray公司CyberKnife治疗系统（配备Xchange机器人准直器更换器）召回通知。在某些情况下，准直器可能未完全对接，触发系统联锁并阻止操作台控制运动。若此时人员进入治疗室并使用室内控制手柄启动运动，准直器可能意外移动，造成受伤风险。医疗机构应立即遵循厂家召回指导，确保工作人员知晓在该联锁激活时不得使用室内手柄。

title.en: Accuray Recalls CyberKnife System with Xchange Robotic Collimator Changer Over Undocked Collimator Hazard
title.zh: Accuray召回配备Xchange机器人准直器更换器的CyberKnife系统，因准直器未完全对接风险

summary.en: Accuray Incorporated is recalling the CyberKnife Treatment Delivery System with Xchange Robotic Collimator Changer because the collimator may not fully dock, causing a system interlock that disables operator console motion. If personnel then enter the treatment room and use the in-room control pendant, the undocked collimator could move unexpectedly, posing an injury risk. The FDA has classified this as a Class II recall; all affected facilities should immediately follow the manufacturer’s correction instructions to prevent unintended motion.
summary.zh: Accuray公司正在召回配备Xchange机器人准直器更换器的CyberKnife治疗输送系统，原因是准直器可能未完全对接，触发系统联锁并阻止操作台控制运动。若人员随后进入治疗室并使用室内控制手柄启动运动，未对接的准直器可能意外移动，造成受伤风险。FDA将其定为II级召回，所有受影响机构应立即按照制造商纠正说明操作，避免意外移动。

title.en: Device Recall: Siemens ARTIS icono ceiling – Monitor Suspension Screws May Loosen and Pose Fall Risk
title.zh: 西门子ARTIS icono天花板悬吊显示器因螺钉松动可能坠落被召回

summary.en: Siemens Medical Solutions USA is recalling the ARTIS icono ceiling system (model 11328100) due to a potential safety issue with the Display ceiling suspension (DCS Fix XL). The screws that secure the monitor to the suspension can gradually loosen over time, creating a risk that the monitor could detach and fall. A falling monitor may cause serious injury to patients or healthcare personnel during procedures. Customers are advised to follow Siemens’ urgent field safety notice to inspect and tighten affected screws, and to implement interim precautions until the corrective action is completed.
summary.zh: Siemens Medical Solutions USA 主动召回 ARTIS icono 天花板悬吊系统（型号 11328100），原因是固定显示器的天花板悬吊装置（DCS Fix XL）的螺钉可能随时间逐渐松动，导致显示器脱落风险。显示器坠落可能对手术中的患者或操作人员造成严重伤害。受影响用户应立即按照 Siemens 的紧急现场安全通知检查并紧固相关螺钉，并采取临时安全措施，直至完成修正。

title.en: Medela Inc Recalls ENFit ExSet 60ml Enteral Syringe Due to Incorrect Connectors Causing Misconnection
title.zh: Medela召回ENFit ExSet 60ml肠内注射器，因连接器错误可能导致连接不兼容

summary.en: Medela Inc. is recalling its ENFit ExSet Sterile 60ml enteral syringe (Model: ENF060182LD / Catalog: 101033086) because it may contain incorrect connectors that will not attach properly or could misconnect to ENFit systems, making the device incompatible. The defect could lead to a slight delay in delivery of enteral nutritional fluids or oral medications. The FDA has classified this as a Class II recall. Healthcare facilities should immediately identify affected lots, quarantine the product, and follow Medela's return or replacement instructions.
summary.zh: Medela公司正在召回其ENFit ExSet无菌60ml肠内注射器（型号：ENF060182LD / 目录号：101033086），原因是可能含有错误的连接器，无法正确连接或可能错误连接到ENFit系统，导致设备不兼容。该缺陷可能导致肠内营养液或口服药物输送的轻微延迟。FDA已将此定为II级召回。医疗机构应立即识别受影响批次，隔离产品，并按照Medela的退货或更换指引处理。

title.en: FDA Announces Recall of Remel GC Agar Base (Product #R04030, R01460) Due to Reduced Neisseria gonorrhoeae Recovery
title.zh: FDA召回Remel淋球菌琼脂基础产品，因淋病奈瑟菌回收率降低

summary.en: The FDA has issued a recall for Remel GC Agar Base (150mm, #R04030, and 100mm, #R01460) due to reduced or absent recovery of certain Neisseria gonorrhoeae strains, compromising diagnostic accuracy. Laboratories using these products for gonorrhea testing should immediately stop use, segregate affected inventory, and contact Thermo Fisher Scientific for return instructions. False-negative results may delay appropriate treatment, increase risk of complications, and facilitate continued transmission of gonorrhea.
summary.zh: 美国FDA宣布召回Remel公司生产的GC琼脂基础产品（150mm规格货号R04030，100mm规格货号R01460），因该产品对某些淋病奈瑟菌菌株回收率降低或无法回收，影响诊断准确性。使用该产品进行淋病检测的实验室应立即停用、隔离库存，并联系Thermo Fisher Scientific进行退回处理。假阴性结果可能导致治疗延误、并发症风险上升，并增加淋病持续传播的风险。

title.en: FDA Revised Cybersecurity Guidance for Medical Devices (Feb 2026)
title.zh: FDA 修订医疗器械网络安全上市前提交指南（2026年2月）

summary.en: Issued 3 February 2026, superseding the June 2025 version. Aligns with the new QMSR and ISO 13485. Applies to all devices with cybersecurity considerations, not just network-connected devices. Key expectations: Secure Product Development Framework (SPDF), threat modeling, Software Bill of Materials (SBOM), eight security control categories (authentication, authorization, cryptography, integrity, confidentiality, event detection, resiliency, updatability), and coordinated vulnerability disclosure processes.
summary.zh: 2026年2月3日发布，取代2025年6月版本，与新 QMSR 和 ISO 13485 保持一致。适用于所有具有网络安全考量的器械（不限于联网设备）。核心要求：安全产品开发框架（SPDF）、威胁建模、软件物料清单（SBOM）、八大安全控制类别（认证、授权、加密、完整性、机密性、事件检测、弹性恢复、可更新性），以及协调漏洞披露流程。

title.en: QMSR Takes Effect -- 21 CFR Part 820 Incorporates ISO 13485:2016
title.zh: QMSR 正式生效 -- 21 CFR Part 820 纳入 ISO 13485:2016

summary.en: Effective 2 February 2026, the FDA's Quality Management System Regulation (QMSR) amends 21 CFR Part 820 by incorporating ISO 13485:2016 by reference. The legacy Quality System Inspection Technique (QSIT) was discontinued and replaced by Compliance Program 7382.850, aligned with ISO 13485. Manufacturers must now explicitly comply with ISO 13485:2016 requirements. Two older guidance documents (1997 design control guidance and 2008 PMA manufacturing inspection guidance) were withdrawn.
summary.zh: 2026年2月2日生效，FDA 质量管理体系法规（QMSR）修订 21 CFR Part 820，正式纳入 ISO 13485:2016。旧版质量体系检查技术（QSIT）被废止，替换为与 ISO 13485 一致的合规程序 7382.850。制造商须明确满足 ISO 13485:2016 要求。1997年设计控制指南和2008年 PMA 生产检查指南已同步撤回。
